groups.name: Operations Manager
groups.responsibilities: Runs stock sites, vendor partners, dispatch orders, arrivals, and audit counts.

groups.name: Billing Clerk
groups.responsibilities: Issues billing dockets, records settlements, and manages account clients.

groups.name: HR Manager
groups.responsibilities: Manages workforce, time off, attendance, timesheets, and payroll.

groups.name: Read Only Auditor
groups.responsibilities: Reviews business records, audit logs, and scheduled report snapshots.
